General.Name: Nimble Holdings Co Ltd
General.Description: Nimble Holdings Company Limited, an investment holding company, engages in property development and operation in the People's Republic of China and the United States. The company operates through PRC Property Development, Emerson, and PRC Household Appliances segments. It is also involved in the distribution of houseware and audio products; trading of household appliances, wires, and cables; provision of IT system development and related services; and licensing businesses, as well as provision management services. The company was formerly known as The Grande Holdings Limited and changed its name to Nimble Holdings Company Limited in February 2018. The company was incorporated in 1990 and is based in Tsuen Wan, Hong Kong. Nimble Holdings Company Limited is a subsidiary of Wealth Warrior Global Limited.
General.Address: TML Tower, Tsuen Wan, Hong Kong
